zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas FitzMaurice Lord of Connello於大約1150年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 懷可福德時，他的父親Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIII46歲，母親Alice Montgomery49歲。他於1195年之前與Ellinor de Marisco在愛爾蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1213年在愛爾蘭庫迪 沃特福德登加瓦享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas FitzMaurice Lord of Connello于大约1150年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 懷可福德时，他的父亲Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIII46岁，母亲Alice Montgomery49岁。他于1195年之前与Ellinor de Marisco在爱尔兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1213年在爱尔兰庫迪 沃特福德登加瓦享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: FitzMaurice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Aidan, Ciaran, Colm.

Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Maurice (see Morris 1), ‘son of Maurice’. This surname is common in Ireland, where it has also been Gaelicized as Mac Muiris. The Irish family of Fitzmaurice share a common Norman ancestry with the Fitzgerald family. They can be traced to Thomas Fitzmaurice, whose brother Gerald was the ancestor of the Irish Fitzgerald dynasty. Their father was Maurice Fitzgerald, a Norman baron (died 1176).

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.description: Arrival of Normans at Baginbun in Co. Wexford thus started 800 year struggle between English and Irish.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas FitzMaurice Lord of Connello was born about 1150, in County Wexford, Ireland, his father, Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIII, was 46 and his mother, Alice Montgomery, was 49. He married Ellinor de Marisco before 1195, in Ireland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1213, in Dungarvan, County Waterford, Ireland, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas FitzMaurice Lord of Connello est né environ 1150, à County Wexford, Irlande, son père, Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIII, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Alice Montgomery, avait 49 ans. Il a épousé Ellinor de Marisco avant 1195, à Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1213, à Dungarvan, County Waterford, Irlande, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas FitzMaurice Lord of Connello um 1150 in County Wexford, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIII 46 und seine Mutter Alice Montgomery 49. Er hat vor 1195 in Irland Ellinor de Marisco geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1213 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Dungarvan, County Waterford, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas FitzMaurice Lord of Connello è nato il circa 1150 nel County Wexford, Irlanda, il suo padre, Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIII, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Alice Montgomery, aveva 49 anni. Lui sposato Ellinor de Marisco prima del 1195, nel Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1213, nel Dungarvan, County Waterford, Irlanda, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas FitzMaurice Lord of Connelloが約1150年にアイルランドコウントイ ウエクスフォードで生まれた時，父Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIIIは46歳，母Alice Montgomeryは49歳であった。1195年以前にアイルランドでEllinor de Mariscoと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1213年にアイルランドコウントイ ワテルフォードダンガーヴァンで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas FitzMaurice Lord of Connello(이)가 대략 1150년 아일랜드 카운티 베스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIII(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Montgomery(은)는 49세였다. 그는 1195년 이전 아일랜드에서 Ellinor de Marisco(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1213년 아일랜드 카운티 왓르퍼드 던가반에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas FitzMaurice Lord of Connello nasceu aproximadamente 1150, em County Wexford, Irlanda, seu pai, Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIII, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Alice Montgomery, tinha 49 anos. Ele casou-se com Ellinor de Marisco antes 1195, em Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1213, em Dungarvan, County Waterford, Irlanda, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas FitzMaurice Lord of Connello родился около 1150 г. в местности коунти вексфорд, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIII было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Montgomery, 49. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellinor de Marisco перед 1195 г. в местности Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1213 г. в местности дунгарван, коунти вэитирфорд, Ирландия в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas FitzMaurice Lord of Connello nació aproximadamente 1150, en County Wexford, Irlanda, su papá, Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIII, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Alice Montgomery, tenía 49 años. Se casó con Ellinor de Marisco antes de 1195, en Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1213, en Dungarvan, County Waterford, Irlanda, a la edad de 64 años.
